name: The United Nilgiri Tea Estates Company Limited
summary: The United Nilgiri Tea Estates Company Limited engages in growing, manufacturing, and selling teas in India. The company offers black, special, green, herbal, and gift teas. It is also involved in letting-out of properties. The company also exports its products to Australia, Congo, Canada, Germany, the Netherlands, Denmark, Finland, Japan, the United States, and the United Kingdom. The United Nilgiri Tea Estates Company Limited was founded in 1922 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
